match.userMessage: Create a concise plan for the plan request-changes e2e test.

arguments.title: E2E Request Changes Plan
arguments.plan:
## Overview
Initial plan for the request-changes e2e test.

## Steps
1. Create the initial feature.
2. Verify it works.

## Verification
Run the test suite.

match.userMessage: Add a testing section with unit and integration tests

arguments.title: E2E Request Changes Plan
arguments.plan:
## Overview
Revised plan for the request-changes e2e test.

## Steps
1. Create the initial feature.
2. Write unit tests for all functions.
3. Write integration tests for the API.
4. Verify it works.

## Verification
Run the test suite and check coverage.
